params.qin: ("Pangkarlangu" AND (Warlpiri OR "Northern Territory" OR Australia)) AND mediatype:texts
params.query: ((text:Pangkarlangu OR text:Pangkarlangu OR text__reviews:Pangkarlangu) AND ((text:Warlpiri OR text:Warlpiri OR text__reviews:Warlpiri) OR (text:"Northern Territory" OR text:"Northern Territory" OR text__reviews:"Northern Territory") OR (text:Australia OR text:Australia OR text__reviews:Australia))) AND mediatype:texts
